# PHANTOM

> PHANTOM is a free, end-to-end encrypted messenger for Android, built to keep
> working in places where ordinary messaging and VPN apps are blocked.

## What it is

PHANTOM is a private messenger. Messages and voice calls are end-to-end
encrypted, so only the sender and the recipient can read or hear them. The
server never sees plaintext. It is distributed as a direct Android download,
not through an app store, so it stays reachable where app stores are restricted.

## Who it is for

People in censored or surveilled networks who need private communication that
does not depend on a phone number, an email address, or an app store, and that
keeps working when other apps are blocked.

## Key features

- End-to-end encrypted messages: only you and your contact can read them.
- End-to-end encrypted voice calls, disguised as an ordinary secure web connection.
- No phone number and no email: your account is a nickname plus the keys on your device.
- No tracking and no analytics.
- Encryption keys are created on your device and never leave it.
- Messages are stored only on your device; the server deletes them once delivered.
- Anti-censorship transport: when a network blocks normal apps, PHANTOM
  automatically finds a path through and disguises its traffic as ordinary web browsing.
- Android only for now; there is no iPhone version yet.

## Cost

Free. No subscription and no ads.

## Download

Android APK: https://myphantom.org/latest.apk
Landing page: https://myphantom.org/

To update later, install the new file over the existing app. Do not uninstall,
as that erases the account and chat history.
